rationale: Ground truth closes #4891 as a duplicate of #4808 (see #4809 for details); X reaches exactly this verdict, ties it to the #4809 triage tracking issue, and flags a legitimate real risk (that #4808 shows closed/unmerged and the regression test doesn't cover this file) while explicitly caveating it could only verify the rebase branch, not upstream main. Y instead asserts the bug is 'already fixed on main' via a grep/line-content check, which contradicts X's finding that #4808 never merged and overclaims verification of upstream main state without the same hedge — a plausible but unverified and less-grounded claim that diverges from the actual duplicate-closure resolution.
